title: Quantum Probabilistic Label Refining: Enhancing Label Quality for Robust Image Classification

key_components: Variational Quantum Circuits (VQCs) for image encoding
Quantum measurement to extract sample-specific probabilistic labels
Classical CNN trained with soft-target cross-entropy loss
methodology.theoretical_foundation: Born rule for quantum measurement probabilities
methodology.problem_addressed: Overconfidence in deep learning models trained with one-hot labels

performance_improvements.accuracy_under_corruptions: Up to 50% better on MNIST and Fashion-MNIST

key_contributions: QPLR framework for hybrid quantum-classical learning

related_work.applications: Near-term quantum advantage in supervised learning tasks
